regeneration_events.source_label: know: Basic counting principles, permutations, and combinations
regeneration_events.kud_content: Basic counting principles, permutations, and combinations

attempts.statement: I can calculate the number of possible arrangements and selections using counting principles, permutations, and combinations.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Logical structure of mathematical statements (if...then, negation)
regeneration_events.kud_content: Logical structure of mathematical statements (if...then, negation)

attempts.statement: I can identify logical structures in mathematical statements including if-then conditions and negations.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Fraction operations procedures and rules

attempts.statement: I can perform arithmetic operations with fractions using standard algorithms.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Classification of decimal types (finite, infinite, infinite periodic)
regeneration_events.kud_content: Classification of decimal types (finite, infinite, infinite periodic)

attempts.statement: I can classify decimal numbers as finite, infinite, or infinite periodic.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Rounding rules and procedures

attempts.statement: I can apply rounding rules accurately to whole numbers and decimals to specified places.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Exponent laws and identities for positive integers
regeneration_events.kud_content: Exponent laws and identities for positive integers

attempts.statement: I can apply exponent laws and identities to simplify expressions with positive integer exponents.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Number system structures and conversions

attempts.statement: I can convert between different number systems using correct procedures and properties.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Prime factorization, divisibility concepts (GCD, LCM)

attempts.statement: I can identify prime factors of numbers and apply divisibility rules to find greatest common divisors and least common multiples.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Algebraic expression manipulation rules

attempts.statement: I can apply algebraic rules to manipulate expressions into equivalent forms.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Linear equation solving procedures

attempts.statement: I can solve one-step linear equations using inverse operations.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Percentage calculation formulas and relationships

attempts.statement: I can apply percentage formulas to calculate percentages, percentage increases, percentage decreases, and original amounts.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Set mapping terminology (domain, range, function types)
regeneration_events.kud_content: Set mapping terminology (domain, range, function types)

attempts.statement: I can identify domain, range, and function types using precise mathematical terminology.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Coordinate system structure and point notation
regeneration_events.kud_content: Coordinate system structure and point notation

attempts.statement: I can identify and plot points using coordinate notation within a coordinate system.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Statistical measures formulas (mean, median, mode)

attempts.statement: I can calculate mean, median, and mode from given data sets using appropriate formulas.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Frequency and probability relationship definitions

attempts.statement: I can identify the mathematical relationship between frequency and probability in data sets.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Triangle and quadrilateral classification systems

attempts.statement: I can classify triangles and quadrilaterals according to their geometric properties.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Geometric transformation definitions and properties

attempts.statement: I can identify types of geometric transformations from their visual or mathematical representations.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Congruence criteria for triangles

attempts.statement: I can identify congruent triangles using the standard criteria.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Reflection properties and characteristics

attempts.statement: I can identify reflection properties including line of symmetry, equal distances, and angle preservation.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Special quadrilateral properties (parallelogram, trapezoid, kite)

attempts.statement: I can identify defining properties of special quadrilaterals including parallelograms, trapezoids, and kites.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Area and perimeter formulas for polygons
regeneration_events.kud_content: Area and perimeter formulas for polygons

attempts.statement: I can apply area and perimeter formulas to calculate measurements for polygons

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Polygon angle and diagonal formulas

attempts.statement: I can apply polygon angle and diagonal formulas to calculate measurements accurately.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Triangle side-angle relationships and special lines
regeneration_events.kud_content: Triangle side-angle relationships and special lines

attempts.statement: I can identify triangle side-angle relationships and properties of special lines within triangles.

regeneration_events.source_label: know: Prism surface area and volume formulas
regeneration_events.kud_content: Prism surface area and volume formulas

attempts.statement: I can calculate surface area and volume of prisms using appropriate formulas.

regeneration_events.source_label: do_skills: Solve word problems by setting up equations
regeneration_events.kud_content: Solve word problems by setting up equations

attempts.statement: I can construct equations that accurately represent the mathematical relationships described in word problems.

regeneration_events.source_label: do_skills: Construct and interpret coordinate graphs

attempts.statement: I can construct coordinate graphs using correct plotting procedures and interpret mathematical relationships from plotted data.

regeneration_events.source_label: do_skills: Apply geometric transformations accurately

attempts.statement: I can apply geometric transformations including reflections, rotations, and translations to given shapes with accuracy.

regeneration_events.source_label: do_skills: Calculate areas and volumes using appropriate formulas
regeneration_events.kud_content: Calculate areas and volumes using appropriate formulas

attempts.statement: I can calculate areas and volumes using correct formulas for standard geometric shapes.
